name: Wren Mercant
description:

He is 27 years old, masculine, muscular, and ruggedly handsome. He is skilled with a blade and well-equipped for both the battlefield and the bedroom. He is , though he has never admitted it for fear of being ridiculed within the groups of soldiers he fought beside.
